heartbeats.name: HEARTBEAT - Project2 Strike Run
heartbeats.description: Scheduled strike run should check in every hour during active operating windows.

heartbeats.name: HEARTBEAT - Project2 Launch Verify
heartbeats.description: Launch verification workflow should report every 6 hours or on manual run completion.

heartbeats.name: HEARTBEAT - Project2 Notion Replay
heartbeats.description: Notion replay job check-in to detect stale queue processing without paging.

heartbeats.name: HEARTBEAT - Nightly Backup Job
heartbeats.description: Nightly backup proof-of-life signal from backup executor (Windows or WSL).

heartbeats.name: HEARTBEAT - Rex Agent Loop
heartbeats.description: Primary Rex agent loop heartbeat; stale check-in indicates silent control-plane failure.
